events.starter_episode_click: Visitor selects a recommended starter episode.
events.start_listening_click: Visitor activates a primary listening CTA.
events.instagram_click: Visitor opens the official Instagram profile.
events.hotline_click: Visitor opens the Throuple Hotline submission flow.
events.tea_list_click: Visitor opens the Tea List signup flow.
events.podcast_platform_click: Visitor selects Spotify, Apple, Amazon, YouTube, or iHeart.
events.episode_share: Visitor shares or copies an episode URL.
events.scroll_depth: Visitor reaches a tracked page-depth milestone.
events.pwa_install_available: Browser reports that installation is available.
events.pwa_standalone_launch: Visitor launches the saved app experience.
events.push_entry_click: Visitor activates the existing push-notification entry point.
events.newsletter_open: Visitor opens the newsletter or Tea List interface.
